testcase.name: breedNamesMustBeLowercase
testcase.system-out:
10:25:44.155 [main] DEBUG org.testng.TestNG -- suiteXmlPath: "C:\CursosUdemy\desafio-agibank\dog-api-tests\src\test\resources\testng.xml" 10:25:44.278 [main] INFO org.testng.internal.Utils -- [XmlSuite] [WARN] 'parallel' value 'false' is no longer valid, defaulting to 'none'. 10:25:44.829 [main] WARN org.testng.TestNG -- Ignoring duplicate listener : io.qameta.allure.testng.AllureTestNg 10:25:44.829 [main] WARN org.testng.TestNG -- Ignoring duplicate listener : io.qameta.allure.testng.AllureTestNg 10:25:44.829 [main] WARN org.testng.TestNG -- Ignoring duplicate listener : io.qameta.allure.testng.AllureTestNg ... ...
